---
title: "Beneath the Cross: Readings for Children in Our Lord’s Seven Sayings. By Florence Wilford. Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge. With a preface by the Rev. R.F. Wilson, M.A., Vicar of Rownhams."
---

## Beneath the Cross: Readings for Children in Our Lord’s Seven Sayings. By Florence Wilford. Edited by Charlotte M. Yonge. With a preface by the Rev. R.F. Wilson, M.A., Vicar of Rownhams.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1869
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology (by another)
**Format:** edited book

**Publisher:** London: J. Masters & Co., 78, New Bond Street

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
